Bloodmaster.name: Bloodmaster

abilities: Command squad, Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Khorne, Terrifying(-1)
Entourage: For each Greater Daemon of the same Chaos god, up to two units with this rule can be can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.
Locus of Khorne: The model and its attached unit get the "Favoured enemy(everything)" special rule.

Bloodthirster.name: Bloodthirster
Bloodthirster.equipped_with: A Bloodthirster is equipped with: Axe of Khorne; Whip of Khorne.

option_groups.header: Only one Greater Daemon of each type per army.

abilities: Deep strike, Fearless, Greater Daemon, Mark of Khorne, Terrifying(-2)

Changecaster.name: Changecaster

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with a Staff of change for +63 points.

abilities: Command squad, Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Tzeentch, Terrifying(-1)
Entourage: For each Greater Daemon of the same Chaos god, up to two units with this rule can be can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.
Locus of Tzeentch: The model and its attached unit gain Precision(5+).
Psyker: The model can cast 2 powers and deny 2 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from the discipline of Change.

Contorted Epitome.name: Contorted Epitome
Contorted Epitome.equipped_with: A Contorted Epitome is equipped with: Ravaging claws.
abilities: Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Slaanesh, Terrifying(-1)

Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and one power from the discipline of Excess.
Swallow Energy: Attacks against the model or its attached unit suffer a -1 penalty to Wound rolls.

Great Unclean One.name: Great Unclean One
Great Unclean One.equipped_with: A Great Unclean One is equipped with: Bileblade; Doomsday bell; Nurgling infestation; Putrid vomit.

weapons.name: Nurgling infestation
weapons.abilities: The bearer inflicts 4 automatic hits with this weapon in close combat, Poison(4+)

option_groups.header: Can exchange its Bileblade
Can exchange its Doomsday bell
Only one Greater Daemon of each type per army.

abilities: Deep strike, Fearless, Greater Daemon, Mark of Nurgle, Regeneration(1), Terrifying(-2)
Bileblade: The model may suffer 1 Mortal Wound in exchange for getting a bonus of +1 to the next manifestation or deny of a psychic power.

Doomsday bell: The model may heal a friendly unit within 7" for D3 wounds during its activation. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Only works on models that have the "Daemon" and "Mark of Nurgle" abilities. Character models and vehicles are always excluded.
Psyker: The model can cast 2 powers and deny 2 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from the discipline of Decay.

Infernal Enrapturess.name: Infernal Enrapturess
Infernal Enrapturess.equipped_with: An Infernal Enrapturess is equipped with: Ravaging claws.

Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.
Discordant Disruption: Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a Perils of the Warp attack on any double.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and one power from the discipline of Excess.

weapons.abilities: AT(3), Slow(-3), Flurry(2), Only 2 attacks per activation can be done with this profile.

abilities: Deep strike, Deflect, Fearless, Greater Daemon, Mark of Slaanesh, Parry, Terrifying(-2)
Psyker: The model can cast 2 powers and deny 2 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from the discipline of Excess.

weapons.name: Staff of Tzeentch
weapons.abilities: AT(1), Each time when a Character model is slain with this weapon a Chaos Spawn enters the battlefield at the exact spot under your command.

option_groups.header: Only one Greater Daemon of each type per army.

abilities: Deep strike, Fearless, Greater Daemon, Mark of Tzeentch, Terrifying(-2)
Master of Magic: A Lord of Change can never peril. Additionally, he uses 3 dice and discards the lowest while manifesting and denying psychic powers.
Psyker: The model can cast 3 powers and deny 3 powers per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from all general disciplines and the discipline of Change.

Poxbringer.name: Poxbringer
Poxbringer.equipped_with: A Poxbringer is equipped with: Bilesword.
abilities: Command squad, Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Nurgle, Terrifying(-1)
Entourage: For each Greater Daemon of the same Chaos god, up to two units with this rule can be can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.
Locus of Nurgle: The model and its attached unit can still fight in close combat, even if they have already been slain before their initiative step.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and one power from the discipline of Decay.

Sloppity Bilepiper.name: Sloppity Bilepiper
Sloppity Bilepiper.equipped_with: A Sloppity Bilepiper is equipped with: Marotter.
abilities: Command squad, Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Nurgle, Terrifying(-1)
Entourage: For each Greater Daemon of the same Chaos god, up to two units with this rule can be can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.

Disease of Mirth: The model and its attached unit roll an additional die for Leadership tests and discard the highest. Whenever an enemy unit within 14" fails a Leadership test, one model in that unit is slain. Character models and Monstrous Creatures are unaffected.
Jolly Gutpipes: During the activation, select a friendly Mark of Nurgle unit that is within 7" of the Sloppity Bilepiper. All models in that unit move +1" until the end of their next activation.

Spoilpox Scrivener.name: Spoilpox Scrivener
Spoilpox Scrivener.equipped_with: A Spoilpox Scrivener is equipped with: Distended maw; Disgusting sneezes.
abilities: Command squad, Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Nurgle, Terrifying(-1)
Entourage: For each Greater Daemon of the same Chaos god, up to two units with this rule can be can be chosen that do not occupy an HQ slot.
Herald: Up to two units with this rule can be taken as a single HQ choice.
Keep Counting! Meet your Quota!: During the activation, select a friendly Mark of Nurgle unit that is within 7" of the Spoilpox Scrivener. All models in that unit gain +1 to hit rolls.

Tranceweaver.equipped_with: A Tranceweaver is equipped with: Ravaging claws.

Bloodletters.name: Bloodletters
Bloodletters.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Hellblade.

option_groups.header: One model may be equipped with
Another model may be equipped with
The unit may be equipped with brass armor for +11 points per model.

abilities: Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Khorne, Terrifying(-1)
Brass armor: The model gains a 3+ save.

Icon of Chaos: A friendly Daemon unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. If the arriving unit has the same Mark of Chaos as the bearer, it can instead be placed within 6". The icon must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.
Instrument of Chaos: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Combat resolutions.

Blue Horrors.name: Blue Horrors
Blue Horrors.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Coruscating flames.

option_groups.header: One model may be equipped with
Another model may be equipped with

abilities: Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Infantry, Mark of Tzeentch, Terrifying(-1)

Icon of Chaos: A friendly Daemon unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. If the arriving unit has the same Mark of Chaos as the bearer, it can instead be placed within 6". The icon must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.
Instrument of Chaos: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Combat resolutions.
Split: After each activation in which the unit lost at least one Blue Horror, roll a die for each lost model. On a 4+, a killed Blue Horror is replaced by a Brimstone Horror.

Icon of Chaos: A friendly Daemon unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. If the arriving unit has the same Mark of Chaos as the bearer, it can instead be placed within 6". The icon must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.
Instrument of Chaos: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Combat resolutions.

Split: After each activation in which the unit lost at least one Pink Horror or Blue Horror, roll a die for each lost model. On a 4+, a killed Pink Horror is replaced by 2 Blue Horrors. A killed Blue Horror is replaced by a Brimstone Horror.

Slashing Dive: If the unit moves over an enemy unit with any command, that unit receives two automatic hits per Screamer with the Warp jaws profile.

Seekers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Piercing claws.

Instrument of Chaos: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Combat resolutions.

Slaughterbrute.name: Slaughterbrute
Slaughterbrute.equipped_with: A Slaughterbrute is equipped with: Mighty jaw; Slaughter claws.
abilities: Daemon, Frenzy(2"), Mark of Khorne, Daemonic instability, Squadron, Terrifying(-1)
Bound Beast: For every HQ unit with a Mark of Khorne, you may select one Slaughterbrute without using up a Fast Attack slot.
Eager for carnage: The model automatically advances 6" with an "Advance" command.

Burning Chariot.name: Burning Chariot
Burning Chariot.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Fire of Tzeentch, Warp jaws.
abilities: Deepstrike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Tzeentch, Squadron, Terrifying(-1)

Daemon prince.name: Daemon prince
Daemon prince.equipped_with: A Daemon prince is a single model and equipped with: Malefic talons.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
Can get one of the following weapons
If no Mark of Khorne is taken, can be upgraded to a psyker for +5 points.
Can be equipped with wings for +37 points to gain +6" M and the "Jump pack infantry" Unit type.
One Daemon prince per army  can be upgraded to an Ascended Daemon prince for +90 points.

abilities: Deep strike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Terrifying(-1)

Ascended Daemon prince: The unit uses a HQ slot instead of Heavy Support and always counts as the HQ unit with the highest points value in regards to the "Animosity of the Gods" rule. In addition, the model has all Marks of Chaos (already included in the profile), replaces the "Daemon" ability with "Greater Daemon", loses "Daemonic instability", gains "Fearless" and "Terrifying(-2)".
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and 1 power from a chosen discipline.

Mutalith Vortex Beast.name: Mutalith Vortex Beast
Mutalith Vortex Beast.equipped_with: A Mutalith Vortex Beast is equipped with: Betentacled maw; Mutalith claws; Warp Vortex.
abilities: Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Tzeentch, Regeneration(1), Squadron, Terrifying(-1)

Skull Cannon.name: Skull Cannon
Skull Cannon.equipped_with: A Skull Cannon is equipped with: Hellblade; Skull Cannon.
abilities: Deep strike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Khorne, Terrifying(-1)

Soul Grinder.name: Soul Grinder
Soul Grinder.equipped_with: A Soul Grinder is equipped with: Harvester gun; Iron claw; Maw cannon; Warpsword.

option_groups.header: Can take a Mark of Chaos

abilities: Deep strike, Daemon, Terrifying(-1)

Feculent Gnarlmaw.name: Feculent Gnarlmaw
Feculent Gnarlmaw.equipped_with: A Feculent Gnarlmaw is a single model and equipped with: Sickness Blossoms.
abilities: Daemon, Daemonic instability, Mark of Nurgle

Gnarlmaw infestation: Set up each Gnarlmaw individually during the deployment process, after every other unit has been placed. They do not have to be within 2" of each other. They can't be placed closer than 6" to enemy units, but can be placed anywhere on the table.
Shroud of Flies: Friendly models with the "Mark of Nurgle" ability within 6" count as benefitting from obscuring terrain.

The Plague Bells Chime: The model may heal a friendly unit (excluding itself) within 7" for D3 wounds during its activation. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Only works on models that have the "Daemon" and "Mark of Nurgle" abilities. Character models and vehicles are always excluded.
Unmanned: A Feculent Gnarlmaw can't contest or capture mission objectives.

Daemon Brutes.name: Demon Brutes
Daemon Brutes.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Immaterial armaments.

option_groups.header: All models may receive a Mark of Chaos (points per model)

abilities: Bodyguard, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Terrifying(-1)

equipment.name: Aura of acquiescenceˢ
equipment.desc: Enemy units in close combat lose 1 Initiative to a minimum of 1.

equipment.name: Blood throneᴷ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +2 Toughness, +3 Wounds, +2 Attacks and the "Bike" ability. It loses the "Character" ability.

equipment.name: Boon of Mutation
equipment.desc: During your activation, pick an enemy model within 6" and roll to hit. If the hit is successful, the target must make a Toughness test or become a helpless spawn and removed from play. Character models and Monstrous creatures can't be targeted.

equipment.name: Breath of Chaos
equipment.desc: During your activation, pick a target unit within 9". Roll 4D6. For every 4+ the unit suffers a wound with S:4 AP:-5 D:1, Seeking.

equipment.name: Chaos artefact
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Cloud of fliesᴺ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Deflect" ability.

equipment.name: Exalted butcher
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Exalted hunter
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Full to Burstingᴺ
equipment.desc: When this model is killed, it explodes like a vehicle. Cumulative with "Popping Plague".

equipment.name: Girdle of the Realm Racerˢ
equipment.desc: The model gains +2" Movement and the "Anti-grav" ability.

equipment.name: Hellfire armorᴷ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Instrument of Chaos
equipment.desc: The unit gets a +1 bonus to combat resolution.

equipment.name: Juggernaut of Khorneᴷ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +2 Wounds, +1 Attack and the "Bike" ability.

equipment.name: Khorne necklaceᴷ
equipment.desc: The model is immune against psychic attacks and effects.

equipment.name: Let None Surviveᴷ
equipment.desc: The model automatically succeeds at pursuit rolls to catch fleeing units.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Noxious touchᴺ
equipment.desc: All melee attacks of the model gain Poison(2+).

equipment.name: Nurgle's decayᴺ
equipment.desc: All models of the first enemy unit each round activating within 7" must pass a Toughness test or suffer a wound with S:4 DS:0 D:1 and the "Seeking" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Obsidian bladeᴷ
equipment.desc: The model gains Deadly(5+) on one of its weapons. If the weapon already has the rule, increase Deadly(x+) by 1. For example Deadly(5+) becomes Deadly(4+).

equipment.name: Palanquin of Nurgleᴺ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Wound and +1 Attack. Only for Heralds.

equipment.name: Personal icon
equipment.desc: A friendly Daemon unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via deepstrike does not scatter. If the bearer has a mark of chaos, only Daemons with the same mark can use the icon.

equipment.name: Plague outburstᴺ
equipment.desc: Each time the model casts a psychic power with a 7+, the nearest enemy unit within 21" suffers 1D3 automatic wound with S:4 DS:0 D:1 and the "Seeking" ability.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Revoltingly Resilientᴺ
equipment.desc: The model gains Regeneration(1). Unique.

equipment.name: Rune of brassᴷ
equipment.desc: Psykers within 18" suffer a "Perils of the Warp" attack on each double when trying to manifest a psychic power. Additionally, they have to roll two dice and apply both peril results.

equipment.name: Seeker of Slaaneshˢ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, +1 Attack, additional Haste(2") and the "Bike" ability.

equipment.name: Soporific muskˢ
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" ability.

equipment.name: Soulstealerˢ
equipment.desc: Once per round, after killing at least one enemy model, the bearer regains 1 wound up to its maximum. Unique.

equipment.name: Sowᴺ
equipment.desc: After the model loses its last Wound, create a Nurglings unit with 1D3 models as close as possible outside of direct base contact with any enemy unit. The Nurglings get an unused order of your choice.

equipment.name: Spiked Armorᴷ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Retribution(1)" ability.

equipment.name: Thrill Seekerˢ
equipment.desc: The Model and its attached unit gain +1 to all Wound rolls and suffer -1 Toughness.

equipment.name: Transfixing gazeˢ
equipment.desc: Enemy models in close combat lose 1 Attack to a minimum of 1.

equipment.name: Unbound furyᴷ
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Furious charge" ability.

equipment.name: Unholy might
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Strength.

equipment.name: Warp conduit
equipment.desc: The army adds +1 to rolls during the Reinforcement phase. Unique.

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: We are legion
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Dreamcatcher talisman
equipment.desc: One enemy psyker per battle-round can be forced to reroll a psychic test to manifest a power.

equipment.name: Eldritch Bolt
equipment.desc: The model can make an additional attack with the following profile: Range: 24" Type: Assault 1 Strength: 8 AP: -5 Damage: 2, AT(1).

equipment.name: Eye of Tzeentch
equipment.desc: The model can reroll a single die each activation.

equipment.name: Illusionist
equipment.desc: Enemy models reduce their weapons range by 6" (to a minimum of 6"), if they target the bearer or its attached unit.

equipment.name: Interdimensional Knowledge
equipment.desc: The model may pick 2 additional psychic powers from any general psychic discipline.

equipment.name: Magical boon
equipment.desc: The model can manifest 1 more psychic power per activation than usual. If it did not know any psychic powers before, it can pick 1.

equipment.name: Overwhelming power
equipment.desc: Psychic tests of 9 or higher can never be denied.

equipment.name: Screamer of Tzeentch
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, 2 Attacks with the "Warp jaws" weapon (see Screamers) and the "Jet bike" ability.

archetypes.name: Assault on Realspace
archetypes.desc: - Units reduce their scatter distance by one D6.

archetypes.name: Calamitous Invasion
archetypes.desc: - Roll 1D6 during each Reinforcement phase. On a 5+ a Meteor appears. The Meteor must be activated like a unit during the same turn it appears. Once you activate the Meteor, place it like a unit arriving from Deep Strike. The scatter roll is always 2D6" and can never be changed. Instead of placing a model, all units within 6" of the final position receive one automatic hit with Strength: 10, AP: -1, Damage: 1; AT(2), Barrage, Seeking, Suppression.

archetypes.name: Figureheads of The Dark Princeˢ
archetypes.desc: - Your HQ models gain +1 Attack while not within 12" of another friendly HQ model.

archetypes.name: Goretideᴷ
archetypes.desc: - Roll 1D6 for each model with the Mark of Khorne that loses its last Wound in melee. On a 5+ they cause an automatic Wound with on of their weapons against an enemy unit in base contact.

archetypes.name: Host Duplicitousᵀ
archetypes.desc: - Psychic powers do not increase their casting values for manifesting them multiple times per round.

archetypes.name: Popping Plagueᴺ
archetypes.desc: - Your units explode like a vehicle upon losing their last Wound.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Pyric Flux
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The target adds +2 to the Strength for all weapons with the "Flames" ability.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Tzeentch's Firestorm
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: Roll 1D6 for each Wound left in the target unit. On a 4+ it receives an automatic wound with S: 4 DS: 0 D: 1; Seeking.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Doombolt
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: One automatic hit with S: 9 AP: -3 D: 2; AT(2), Seeking, Tank hunter.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Glamour of Tzeentch
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The target gains the "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Weaver of Fates
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The target may re-roll 1s for its invulnerability saving throws.

Change (Tzeentch only).name: Temporal Manipulation
Change (Tzeentch only).effect: The caster may heal a friendly unit (excluding itself) with the Mark of Tzeentch for 1D3 wounds. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Decay (Nurgle only).name: Gift of Contagion
Decay (Nurgle only).effect: The target suffers a -1 penalty to its Toughness. "Poison(x+)" attacks gain a +1 bonus to wound rolls.

Decay (Nurgle only).name: Miasma of Pestilence
Decay (Nurgle only).effect: Enemy models attacking the target in melee reduce their number of attacks by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

Decay (Nurgle only).name: Decaying Touch
Decay (Nurgle only).effect: The target suffers a (cumulative) -1 penalty to its Saving throw or Armor value.

Decay (Nurgle only).name: Plague Wind
Decay (Nurgle only).effect: Each model of the target must succeed on a Toughness test or receive one Mortal Wound.

Decay (Nurgle only).name: Nurgle's Dance
Decay (Nurgle only).effect: The caster may heal a friendly unit (excluding itself) with the Mark of Nurgle for 1D3 wounds. Dead models may be revived with this ability. Injured models have to be fully healed first. Can only be successfully manifested once per round and per psyker.

Excess (Slaanesh only).name: Pavane of Slaanesh
Excess (Slaanesh only).effect: Roll 1D6 for each Wound left in the target unit. On a 4+ it receives an automatic wound with S: 4 DS: 0 D: 1; Seeking.

Excess (Slaanesh only).name: Cacophonic Choir
Excess (Slaanesh only).effect: Roll 2D6 and subtract the target's Leadership. The unit receives that amount of automatic wounds with Strength: 5 AP: -6 D: 1; Seeking.

Excess (Slaanesh only).name: Hysterical Frenzy
Excess (Slaanesh only).effect: The target gains +1 Attack for each model and the Precision(5+) ability for all melee weapons.

Excess (Slaanesh only).name: Siren
Excess (Slaanesh only).effect: The target unit must pass a Leadership test with a -1 penalty, or move 6" towards the caster.
Excess (Slaanesh only).duration: Until the next activation of the caster

Excess (Slaanesh only).name: Symphony of Pain
Excess (Slaanesh only).effect: The target suffers a -1 penalty to its Weapon Skill and Strength.
